transcript.message: Hello, thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter at FinSpark, a fintech company that's passionate about leveraging AI to transform the financial services industry. Can you start by telling me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

I'm Shreya Chopra, nice to speak with you, Rohan. Currently, I'm working as an HR Manager at Hooli, where I've been involved in implementing various HR initiatives and processes to improve employee engagement and experience. Lately, I've been focusing on developing and rolling out a new employee onboarding program, which has been well-received by our team.

It sounds like you've been doing some really interesting work in HR, but I'm actually looking for a Senior AI Engineer to join our team. Can you tell me a bit about your background in AI or machine learning, and what motivated you to consider a role in this space?

I don't have direct experience as a Senior AI Engineer, but I've been interested in exploring the intersection of AI and HR. In my current role, I've had the opportunity to work with some AI-powered tools, such as Vector Search and FAISS, to improve our employee data management and analytics. I've also been experimenting with Prompt Engineering and fine-tuning LLMs in my personal projects, which has sparked my interest in the field.

It's great to hear that you've been exploring AI and machine learning in your personal projects, and that you have some experience with tools like Vector Search and FAISS. What specifically drew you to this Senior AI Engineer role at FinSpark, and what do you think you could bring to our team in terms of your skills and experience?

I'm intrigued by FinSpark's mission to leverage AI in the fintech industry, and I believe my skills in areas like Recommendation Systems and Semantic Search could be valuable in this context. Additionally, I'm excited about the opportunity to work with a team that's passionate about innovation and pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI.

It sounds like you're really excited about the opportunity to join our team and contribute your skills to our mission. Can you tell me a bit about your current compensation package and what you're expecting in terms of salary for a role like this Senior AI Engineer position?
I'd rather not discuss my current compensation package at this time, Rohan. However, I can tell you that I'm open to exploring salary options that align with industry standards for a role like this.

I completely understand your preference to keep that information private for now. In terms of the role itself, we're looking for someone who can hit the ground running and contribute to our team's projects immediately. Can you tell me about your availability and notice period, and when you'd be able to start if you were to join us?

I'm currently committed to my role at Hooli, and I'd need to provide a 30-day notice period if I were to leave. As for my availability, I'm open to discussing a start date that works for both parties, but I'd need to ensure a smooth transition of my responsibilities at Hooli before joining FinSpark.

Thank you so much, Shreya, for taking the time to speak with me today and sharing your thoughts about the role. I really appreciate your honesty and openness throughout our conversation. I'll be in touch within the next few days to let you know the next steps and to answer any additional questions you may have. In the meantime, I wish you all the best in your current role and future endeavors, and I hope to have the opportunity to discuss this position further with you soon.

Thank you, Rohan, for the opportunity to speak with you today. I appreciate your time and consideration, and I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon. I wish FinSpark all the best in finding the right candidate for the role, and I'm grateful for the chance to have explored this opportunity with you.
